channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 1st July
item.description:
Damaged sign post with new road layout on leaning but safe at time of inspection 01/07/26
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Large pothole on junction, 1st July
item.description:
On the junction of Barrington Drive there is a large pothole creating a lot of loose gravel which is dangerous for road users. It is difficult to avoid and requires fixing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barrington Drive, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road has broken off into pieces and created a pot hole, 1st July
item.description:
///spider.hurt.hunter Outside number 16

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Westdown Gardens, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 1st July
item.description:
PERM - Made safe with barriers and a permit request will be raised shortly - Cllr reports tree limb across carriageway
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 1st July
item.description:
I am resident on Priory street and I’ve noticed there is a diseased/infect tree outside of 19 priory street specifically. This tree is on the outside the property on the road so, believe it falls under the council. It is leaking sap a lot and has started smell. I worry if not attended to, it could fall onto a house. Please can someone come out and have a look? It might either need spraying or possibly filling.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 1st July
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please cut back overgrown tree branches growing down into footway approx 3 meters x4 meters (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 1st July
item.description:
15 minutes delay boards give and take 28 day plus temporary footway closure please lift and relay x3 sunken rocking 400x400x15mm tactile slab slab (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 1st July
item.description:
Road closure 28day carriage way pothole 600x300x38mm (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover loose make bad noise every time vehicle goes over it, 1st July
item.description:
On road outside Wingmoor lodge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Orchard Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury

item.title: Overgrown grass. Not been cut since winter, 1st July

item.title: Untidy grass along cerb, 30th June

item.title: Reportable, noxious plant, 30th June
item.description:
N L/H verge when heading towards Swindon Village, Just before the railway bridge. First reported 10th June - still there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hyde Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
